EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} changed the property "{object.property}" of the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the property "{object.property}" of the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the property "{object.property}" to file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove the property "{object.property}" of file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} changed the property "{object.property}" of file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to remove the property "{object.property}" of the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change the property "{object.property}" of the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} removed the property "{object.property}" of file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} added the property "{object.property}" to the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to add the property "{object.property}" to the repository "{object.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to add the property "{object.property}" to file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to change the property "{object.property}" of file or folder {object.name} from the repository "{object.group}" on host {event_src.host}
